findings.evidence: `rg -n "Transport|transportToHom|transportInvHom|matrixCoefficientSet_subset_of_surjective"` shows `import ...Transport` at line 6, while the non-transport declarations occupy lines 64-135 and only the transport section at lines 147-182 mentions `Transport`, `transportToHom`, or `transportInvHom`.
findings.fix: Move the non-transport declarations near the coefficient set/span/algebra API in `MatrixCoefficientAdjoin.lean` or split them into a non-transport functorial file; keep only the `*_transport` lemmas behind the `Transport` import.
findings.issue: General lemmas `matrixCoefficient_mem_set_of_map`, `matrixCoefficientSet_subset_of_surjective`, and the submodule/subalgebra inverse-hom lemmas do not use transport but live in a file importing `TauCeti.Algebra.Coalgebra.Comodule.Transport`.

summary: The new API is mostly in the right comodule coefficient area, but the file bundles general coefficient functoriality with transport-specific lemmas, forcing an unrelated `Comodule.Transport` dependency on broadly useful non-transport results.
